creator: meta@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 149640
2.1.8.20141003

- Update to 2.1.8.20141003

So far this port have the PORTVERSION 2.2.0[1], however, it was misunderstanding.
2.2.0 is swfobject library's version. Not the version of speedtest mini itself's.
Its actual version is probably 2.1.8 found in index-php.html, and besides, distfile
is sometimes changed silently without explicit version incrementation. I decided
to include distfile's timestamp in PORTVERSION.

[1] https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=166838
